caption: The video appears to be a presentation or lecture, likely focused on systems thinking and its application to a specific scenario involving bird feeders and their ecological impact. The presenter, Gene Bellinger, is seen in a small window on the right side of the screen, wearing headphones and speaking. The main content of the video is a detailed diagram displayed on a black background with various elements connected by arrows, illustrating a complex system. The diagram includes components such as "Bird Feeder," "Birds at Feeder," "Bird Poop," "Squirrels," "Rodents," "Unsightly Growth," "Spillage," "Buy Bird Seed," "Pleasant Breakfast," "Attractiveness of Garden," and "Frustration." Each element is linked with arrows indicating relationships like "increases," "decreases," "adds to," and "encourages me to make," showing how these factors interact within the system. The presenter seems to be explaining the dynamics and feedback loops within this system, highlighting both positive and negative outcomes.
